body_txt: Even in a series where the characters aren't traditionally good or evil, there will be one who is an idealist . Perhaps they seem to have a strange compulsion to help others even when it isn't convenient , or perhaps they live by a set of principles . From the point of view of the others, that character will be completely untrustworthy; everyone else can be depended upon to act in their own self-interest, but nobody can predict the idealist , especially when they decide to uphold their ideals over their own apparent self-preservation . This trope is a hallmark of Lawful Neutral characters of Type 2 and 3, as well as Chaotic Good characters, and is a major contributor to their frequent Flanderization into Lawful Stupid . Compare Knight Templar and Good Is Dumb . Contrast Chronic Backstabbing Disorder .
